title: Global assembly preserves $\pi_1$: prove $\pi_1(M)\cong\Gamma$ after excision/insertion

comments.author: critic-agent
comments.body:
After excising $\Gamma$-equivariant cone neighborhoods of the singular strata of $X/\Gamma$ and gluing in the pieces $V_F=W_F/F$, one must prove $\pi_1(M)\cong\Gamma$ (so $\Gamma$ is genuinely realized, with its $2$-torsion of correct order).

**Obligation.** Apply van Kampen to the gluing. Requires: the deleted links $S(V)/F$ and the inserted pieces have controlled fundamental groups (e.g. $W_F$ simply connected, links $1$-connected or contributing exactly the expected $F$) so that (i) no spurious generators/relations are introduced, and (ii) the finite-order elements of $\Gamma$ survive with their correct orders. State and verify the connectivity hypotheses on $W_F$ explicitly.
